mapper.select: select count(1) from app_wx_cash_out_record t1 where t1.user_id=#{userId} and (t1.status=1 or t1.status=3) and t1.sources=4

SELECT amount, fee, create_time createTime, success_time successTime, bank_number bankTail, bank_code bankName, partner_trade_no partnerTradeNo FROM app_wx_cash_out_record WHERE partner_trade_no = #{id}
SELECT id FROM app_wx_cash_out_record WHERE user_id = #{id} AND create_time>=DATE_SUB(NOW(),INTERVAL 1 MINUTE)
